titleStmt.title: SII 25.99: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 99. (A.R. No. 99 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

The details of the date of the record viz., Siṁha 30 in the regnal year 2+1+1 of the above king are not sufficient for verification. The record may be assigned on grounds of palaeography to about the 12th century.

It records a gift of taxes antarāyam, nel, nāḍupāḍu and kuḍimai from Atiśayapāṇḍyanallūr alias Kūttakkuḍi in Kīḻ-Kuṇḍāṟu, the dēvadāṉa villages given earlier to the deity Varaguṇapperm.ḷ Kūttāḍudēvar, by Kaṇḍaṉ Uyyavand.āṉ alias Kāṅgayaṉ of Niyamam in Tēṉāṟṟuppōkku to meet the expenses connected with the festival conducted on the day of his natal star Puṉarpūśam, for the food-offerings to be made on the above day, for the persons reciting Tiruppadiyam hymns daily, to the dēvaraḍiyārs accompanying them, the sambāṉ, mattaḷakkāṟaṉ (drummer) and to those who sung Tamil (hymns) daily, in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṉda-nāyaṉār of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulaśekharadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Eti
rāmāṇṭiṉetirāmāṇṭai ciṅkanāyaṟṟu muppatāntiyati nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷa
nāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tirupputtūr tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār koyilile teṉāṟ
ṟuppokku niyamattuk kaṇṭaṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa kāṅkayaṉeṉ Eṉ piṟantanāḷ puṇa
r pūcattu nāḷ tiṅkaḷ tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukaikkum Aṟṟai nāḷāl veṇṭu mamutupaṭi
viñjaṉaṅkaḷukkum nittaṟ tiruppatiyam viṇṇappañ cevvārkaḷuṭaṉ kūṭac cevik
kudevaraṭiyār campāṉukkum mattaḷakkāraṉukkum tamiḻ pāṭu
vāṟkum nittal nimantamāka candrādittavaṟ celkaikku muṉpe varakuṇap perumāḷ kūttāṭu
devaṟku devadāṉamākak kuṭutta kīḻ kuṇṭāṟṟu Aticaiya pāṇṭiya nallūrāṉa kūtta
kkuṭiyil koṇṭuvarukiṟa Antarāyamum nellum maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭa nāṭupāṭu kuṭimai
kaḷum Ittaṉmaṅkaḷ celkaikku nirvārttuk kuṭutteṉ kaṇṭaṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa kāṅ
kayaṉeṉ Itu palmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
